community_notes.excerpt: A community daily-discussion thread identifies Crab Leader as the leader variant of Crabs. Community comments discuss normal Crab attacks as dangerous multi-tile city threats, matching the observed boss targeting pattern.
Steam discussion search did not surface a precise mechanics thread for Crab Leader; no contradiction to the in-game tooltip was found.
Wiki leader pages list boss/leader enemies as tougher mission targets; the in-game tooltip here confirms the display name Crab Leader and move 3.
